rawContent: 不过你不是没学过吗

text: 而且最近我看课 咱们都网聊 不线下见面
So you're complaining that we haven't met up recently.
translation: 所以你是在抱怨最近没见面。
rawContent: So you're complaining that we haven't met up recently. || 所以你是在抱怨最近没见面。
Is that an invitation? || 这是在邀请我？

text: I'm almost done with my training.
rawContent: I'm almost done with my training. || 我快训练完了。

text: Where should we meet? Or... should I come find you?
rawContent: Where should we meet? Or... should I come find you? || 在哪见？还是……我来找你？

text: 我没有，我是说，在我考完试之前我们就保持网聊的意思

replyTo.text: So you're complaining that we haven't met up recently.

text: 我们在聊天框见面就好

replyTo.text: Where should we meet? Or... should I come find you?

rawContent: 'Clingy'?
Is that a complaint? || 这是在抱怨？

text: You were the one who sounded like you were complaining about not meeting up.
translation: 听起来像是在抱怨不见面的人可是你。
rawContent: You were the one who sounded like you were complaining about not meeting up. || 听起来像是在抱怨不见面的人可是你。

text: But fine. If you want to focus on your exam, we'll do as you say.
translation: 不过算了。既然你想专心备考，那就按你说的来。
rawContent: But fine. If you want to focus on your exam, we'll do as you say. || 不过算了。既然你想专心备考，那就按你说的来。

text: 表情包：给我摸摸腹肌/胸肌

rawContent: I'm not finished yet. || 我还没结束。

text: This isn't something you can see just by asking.
translation: 这不是张口就要能看到的。
rawContent: This isn't something you can see just by asking. || 这不是张口就要能看到的。
What's in it for me? || 那我有什么好处？

text: 我没有大奶也没有马甲线
表情包：心虚 思考 冒汗
那你有没有想要的？我实在想不出我能给你什么了
I never said I wanted any of that.
rawContent: I never said I wanted any of that. || 我没说过我要那些。

text: Your self-evaluation seems to have some deviations.
translation: 你的自我评估似乎存在一些偏差。
rawContent: Your self-evaluation seems to have some deviations. || 你的自我评估似乎存在一些偏差。
But since you're asking. || 不过既然你问了。

voiceText: Read me a page from your law textbook.
translation: 念一页你的法考书给我听。
rawContent: [語音消息] || 念一页你的法考书给我听。
That's the price. || 这是报酬。
It's not a fetish. || 这不是癖好。

text: I'm simply assessing whether the value of what you're providing is equivalent to your request.
translation: 我只是在评估你提供的价值，是否和你的要求对等。
rawContent: I'm simply assessing whether the value of what you're providing is equivalent to your request. || 我只是在评估你提供的价值，是否和你的要求对等。

text: To me, hearing you study is more valuable than those things you listed.
translation: 对我而言，听你学习比你列的那些东西有价值多了。
rawContent: To me, hearing you study is more valuable than those things you listed. || 对我而言，听你学习比你列的那些东西有价值多了。
So? Your decision. || 所以？你的决定呢。
Right. || 嗯。
Go eat. || 去吃饭吧。

text: You'll have more energy to read after you've eaten.
rawContent: You'll have more energy to read after you've eaten. || 吃完饭才有力气念书。

text: 我记得你是不是不擅长吃辣椒？
That's quite a spectacular amount of red.
rawContent: That's quite a spectacular amount of red. || 红得有些壮观。

text: It's not that I'm not good at it.
rawContent: It's not that I'm not good at it. || 不是擅不擅长。

text: I just find overwhelming the sense of taste to be an unnecessary stimulus.
translation: 我只是觉得，过度刺激味觉是一种不必要的感官负担。
rawContent: I just find overwhelming the sense of taste to be an unnecessary stimulus. || 我只是觉得，过度刺激味觉是一种不必要的感官负担。
